questions.question:
Find the letter that completes both pairs of words:

CA ( ? ) EN
BU ( ? ) ANK
questions.explanation: The letter T completes both pairs: CAT + TEN, and BUT + TANK. Tip: Start with the most restrictive fragment — the one where fewest letters could possibly work. ✓
